news.headline: S. Korean Consumer Sentiment Actual 101.7 (Forecast -, Previous 100.0)
Lynnette A. Clinton returns as Chief Information Officer at BayCare Health System in Clearwater, Florida.
news.summary: In Clearwater, Florida on October 22, 2024, Lynnette A. Clinton has re-joined BayCare Health System in the role of Chief Information Officer. Clinton previously served as the vice president of applications in the information services department until December of last year. The CIO position marks her return to the health system in a prominent role, overseeing all information technology operations.

news.headline: Fetch partners with Stride to support delivery partners offering insurance, tax tools, and savings. AUSTIN, Texas, Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: This platform, based in Austin, Texas, announced on October 22, 2024, a partnership with Stride to provide independent contractors with access to insurance, tax tools, and financial savings. Fetch, known as the first offsite package management solution for apartment communities, offers this unique service to support independent contractors.

news.headline: Dow Jones drops slightly, Trump stock rises, Tesla falls before earnings. Yields at record high.
news.summary: In afternoon trading on Tuesday, the Dow Jones saw a slight decline as yields continued to reach record highs. Concerns surrounding the upcoming election contributed to increased volatility in the market, leading to drops in the stock prices of Nvidia and Tesla. This news comes amidst a backdrop where the Trump stock performed well. Tesla is encountering a drop in stock value ahead of their earnings report.

news.headline: FAA releases new rules allowing Joby's electric air taxis operation. SFAR sets requirements for integration into US aviation system.
news.summary: In Santa Cruz, California, Joby Aviation, Inc. (NYSE: JOBY), known for developing electric air taxis for commercial passenger service, expressed appreciation for the recently issued regulations aimed at facilitating the operation of their innovative aircraft in the U.S. The Federal Aviation Administration ("FAA") released the Special Federal Aviation Regulation ("SFAR"), outlining guidelines for the secure and effective integration of aircraft similar to Joby's within the country's aviation network.

news.headline: S&P 500 ends slightly down in the Closing Bell report.
OpenAI names Scott Schools, ex-Uber exec, as chief compliance officer to manage regulatory matters.
news.summary: On Tuesday, OpenAI, an artificial intelligence startup, appointed Scott Schools as their chief compliance officer to enhance their ability to develop beneficial AI technology while upholding integrity standards in changing regulatory landscapes. Scott, a legal expert with decades of experience in public and private sectors, previously served as Associate Deputy Attorney General at the U.S. Department of Justice, influencing national legal strategies and offering ethical guidance. This move aims to support OpenAI's commitment to ethical AI development.

news.headline: Amazon One Medical, backed by Amazon.com, launches AI tools to reduce admin tasks for physicians, saving over 17 hours weekly.
news.summary: Amazon One Medical, a subsidiary of Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN), is utilizing AI-driven tools to revolutionize healthcare delivery and alleviate administrative burdens for physicians. By streamlining tasks like record review and note-taking, the company aims to free up more time for patient interaction and improve overall patient experiences. This initiative seeks to combat healthcare provider burnout, with family physicians currently spending an average of over 17 hours per week on administrative duties, equivalent to two full days that could be better utilized for patient care. Andrew Diamond, the chief medical officer at Amazon One Medical, is overseeing these efforts to enhance the efficiency and quality of healthcare services. Meanwhile, Nvidia has teamed up with startup Aidoc to further advance the adoption of AI technology in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: DOJ challenges Johnson & Johnson's bankruptcy bid to dismiss 60,000 talc lawsuits, increased settlement offer to $9 billion.
news.summary: The U.S. Trustee Program, part of the Department of Justice, has motioned to dismiss a Chapter 11 filing by a Johnson & Johnson subsidiary in Houston. This filing aims to resolve over 60,000 talc-related lawsuits, marking J&J's third attempt at this strategy in three years. In September, Johnson & Johnson reportedly raised its settlement offer by $1 billion to a total of around $9 billion to address claims linking its talc baby powder to gynecological cancer. The DOJ contends that J&J's latest bankruptcy move is in bad faith.

news.headline: ASPC is accepting applications for Editor-in-Chief of AJPC. Exciting opportunity announced by the society.
news.summary: In Houston on October 22, 2024, the American Society for Preventive Cardiology (ASPC) disclosed that they are opening applications for the Editor-in-Chief role at the American Journal of Preventive Cardiology (AJPC). This prestigious international journal covers a wide range of topics related to preventive cardiology, offering a platform for researchers and professionals in the field. Interested individuals can now apply for this key position within the organization.

news.headline: VyStar employees volunteer over 6,000 hours in community partnerships during 'Good is everywhere' event.
news.summary: Over a 14-day period, residents in Florida and Georgia were treated to complimentary visits to various cultural institutions, including museums, zoos, and science centers, courtesy of VyStar Credit Union's initiative. The event, held from October 22, 2024, aimed to promote community engagement, volunteerism, and member appreciation. Thousands of individuals benefited from this program, showcasing the credit union's commitment to giving back to the community.

news.headline: Next-generation CLAAS® AcuFORM™ LAAO System to be featured at TCT 2024, presented by Professor Jens Erik Nielsen-Kudsk.
news.summary: Conformal Medical, Inc. will showcase its latest system during a technology innovation session and live case presentation led by Professor Jens Erik Nielsen-Kudsk in Nashua, New Hampshire on October 22, 2024. The company unveiled the next-generation CLAAS® AcuFORM™ Left Atrial Appendage platform.

news.headline: Law firm investigating FSHP, YOTA, PWUP for security law violations on behalf of shareholders. - Oct. 22, 2024
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm focused on investor rights, has initiated an investigation into several companies for potential breaches. Specifically, they are looking into Flag Ship Acquisition Corporation for possible violations of federal securities laws and breaches of fiduciary duties towards shareholders. The investigation aims to assess any discrepancies in the company's conduct. This examination underscores the importance of adhering to regulations and protecting shareholder interests.

news.headline: Enphase Energy's stock drops as Q3 earnings miss projections. US revenue up 43% to $380.9M, European revenue falls 15%.
news.summary: Enphase Energy Inc (NASDAQ:ENPH) disclosed its third-quarter financial results, falling short of analyst predictions. In Q3, the company reported revenues of $380.9 million, below the expected $391.979 million. Adjusted earnings per share were at 65 cents, missing the estimated 77 cents per share. U.S. revenue rose by around 43% from the previous quarter, attributed to increased shipments to distributors. Conversely, European revenues dropped by about 15% quarter-over-quarter due to a "further softening" in demand. For more details, the full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: DBV reports good news for Viaskin® Peanut Patch in US and EU with positive regulatory updates.
Veritex Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: VBTX) declares $0.20 per share quarterly cash dividend on common stock. Payment on/after Nov 22 to shareholders of record by Nov 8, 2024.
news.summary: Dallas-based Veritex Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: VBTX) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share for its common stock. The dividend will be payable on or after November 22, 2024, to shareholders of record as of November 8, 2024. Veritex is the parent company of Veritex Community Bank.

news.headline: Ocean Biomedical received a Staff Determination Letter from Nasdaq stating non-compliance with filing requirements for Forms 10-K and 10-Q for various periods and faced potential delisting.
news.summary: Ocean Biomedical, Inc. received a Staff Determination Letter from Nasdaq stating that it did not comply with filing requirements on April 18, 2024, May 22, 2024, and August 19, 2024, for not filing its Form 10-K and Forms 10-Q. Despite being granted an exception to regain compliance until October 14, 2024, the Company failed to do so. The Company will appeal the determination to a Hearings Panel as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5800 Series. The key dates mentioned are April 18, 2024, May 22, 2024, August 19, 2024, June 17, 2024, August 27, 2024, and October 14, 2024.

news.headline: Conavi Medical Corp. has engaged ICP Securities Inc. for automated market making services at a fee of C$7,500/month.
news.summary: Conavi Medical Corp. has enlisted ICP Securities Inc. for automated market making services, using ICP Premium™ algorithm, in accordance with TSX Venture Exchange guidelines, in a deal starting from October 22, 2024. The agreement is for four months with automatic renewals unless terminated with a fee of C$7,500 monthly. No performance factors or equity compensation included in this no-stock options deal. ICP currently holds no Company securities but may do so in the future, excluding involvement in the deal.

news.headline: Veritex Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: VBTX) reports Q3 2024 results for quarter ended Sept 30, 2024.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Veritex Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: VBTX), the parent company of Veritex Community Bank, shared their quarterly outcomes for the period concluding on September 30, 2024.

news.headline: UGI Corp (NYSE: UGI) to reveal FY 2024 earnings on Nov 21, with conference call on Nov 22 at 9:00 AM ET. Listen live at https://www.ugicorp.com/investors.
news.summary: UGI Corporation (NYSE: UGI) is set to unveil its fiscal year 2024 earnings on November 21, 2024, after the market closes. The company has scheduled a live internet audio webcast for its conference call on November 22 at 9:00 AM ET to delve into the results, financial outlook, and other business developments. Stakeholders can tune in to the live audio webcast and its replay on the company's investor relations website at https://www.ugicorp.com/investors.

news.headline: Reykjavík Energy's green bond auction on Oct 22, 2024 with total bids worth ISK 4,440 million.
news.summary: On October 22nd, 2024, Reykjavík Energy (Orkuveita Reykjavíkur) successfully completed a green bond auction for classes OR031033 GB, OR280845 GB, and OR180255 GB. The auction attracted a total of ISK 4,440 million in bids for nominal value.

news.headline: US API Gasoline Stock Change Actual -2.019M (Forecast -, Previous -5.926M)
US API Distillate Stock Change Actual -1.478M (Forecast -, Previous -2.672M)
US API Cushing Stock Change Actual -0.216M (Forecast -, Previous 0.41M)
US API Crude Oil Stock Change Actual 1.643M (Forecast 0.7M, Previous -1.58M)
San Antonio's holiday season set to begin on November 29, with various festivities including the Ford Holiday River Parade.
news.summary: In San Antonio, the holiday season will begin on November 29 with the Ford Holiday River Parade and the lighting of key locations in the city. The festivities will include the River Walk, Houston Street, the H-E-B Christmas tree in Travis Park, and more. Don't miss out on this opportunity to make your holiday season unforgettable in the Alamo City.

news.headline: Indigenous leadership crucial at COP 16 to protect 30% of Earth by 2030. "Promise" campaign emphasizes their role.
news.summary: In CALI, Colombia, on October 22, 2024, the COP 16 "Promise" initiative aims to emphasize the significance of acknowledging Indigenous Peoples as essential guardians for biodiversity conservation goals. This campaign includes a brief video that underscores the pivotal role Indigenous Peoples play in safeguarding the planet. It stresses the need to recognize Indigenous Peoples' crucial importance in achieving biodiversity conservation targets. The initiative seeks to raise awareness about this issue, underscoring the pressing need to involve Indigenous communities in conservation efforts.

news.headline: Wheels Up to switch to Phenom 300 and Challenger 300 planes, acquire 17 Phenom 300s, and sell Citation X fleet.
news.summary: Wheels Up plans to upgrade its current jet fleets by transitioning to the Phenom 300 Series and Challenger 300 Series aircraft. The company has finalized an agreement to purchase GrandView Aviation's fleet comprising 17 Phenom 300 and Phenom 300E aircraft. Additionally, Wheels Up has entered into an agreement to divest its entire owned fleet of super mid Citation X aircraft. This strategic move will significantly expand and modernize Wheels Up's fleet, providing improved services and capabilities in the aviation industry.

news.headline: Owens Corning unveils 2025 Shingle Color of the Year: "Merlot" - a warm gray, oaky brown, crimson, earthy purple mix.
news.summary: In Toledo, Ohio, Owens Corning (NYSE: OC) unveiled their 2025 Shingle Color of the Year named "Merlot." This unique shade offers a modern twist on traditional red by combining warm gray, oaky brown, spiced sienna, deep crimson, and earthy purple undertones. Positioned as a sophisticated and inviting option for roofing, "Merlot" aims to redefine standard roof color choices. By introducing this full-bodied and classic shingle, Owens Corning looks to provide homes with a subtle yet attractive exterior finish.

news.headline: US food storage container market to grow by USD 2.33 billion from 2024-2028 due to demand for durable containers.
news.summary: In New York, on October 22, 2024, it was reported that artificial intelligence (AI) is playing a significant role in transforming markets. Specifically, the Food Storage Container Market in the United States is projected to increase by approximately USD 2.33 billion between 2024 and 2028, as per analysis by Technavio. The market is anticipated to see a compounded annual growth rate (CAGR) of 3.3% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: $TXN Texas Instruments: China demand drove auto growth.
Activeport Group (ASX: ATV) launches $5.3 million AUD rights issue to raise funds. Time-sensitive financial move.
news.summary: Activeport Group, listed on the Australian Securities Exchange under the symbol ATV, disclosed a major financial initiative. The company is initiating a rights issue with the goal of generating $5.3 million in Australian dollars.

news.headline: Supermajority poll shows potential surge in 2024 election by sporadically voting young women aged 18-35.
news.summary: A report was made public today by Supermajority, a prominent organization advocating for women's equality, in collaboration with HIT Strategies and Lake Research Partners. The report showcases significant insights from a recent survey, emphasizing a notable shift in attitude among young women in the 18-35 age group who have inconsistent voting patterns.

news.headline: Texas Instruments beats Q3 estimates, with earnings of $1.47/share and revenue of $4.151 billion. Shares seesaw with weak Q4 guidance.
news.summary: After the closing bell on Tuesday, Texas Instruments Inc. (NASDAQ: TXN) revealed its third-quarter financial results. The company posted quarterly earnings of $1.47 per share, surpassing the analyst consensus of $1.37. Texas Instruments generated a revenue of $4.151 billion for the quarter, which exceeded the estimated $4.12 billion. Notably, despite a decline in the industrial sector, the company experienced growth in all other end markets. Furthermore, Texas Instruments reported a significant cash flow from operations amounting to $6.2 billion.

news.headline: Elon Musk's $1M giveaway analyzed - Elon, Inc.
Renasant Corp. reports Q3 2024 earnings and shareholder approval for merger with First Bancshares, Inc.
news.summary: The financial institution Renasant Corporation, listed on the NYSE as RNST, revealed their earnings for the third quarter of 2024 in Tupelo, Mississippi on October 22nd.

news.headline: SentriForce celebrates 20-year milestone as a top video surveillance provider in Houston, plans for growth.
news.summary: SentriForce, a Houston-based company specializing in video surveillance solutions, is commemorating its 20th anniversary. Since its inception two decades ago, the firm has been a pioneer in the industry. Through the years, SentriForce has steadily grown its client base to over 10,000 satisfied customers across various sectors. As it celebrates this significant milestone, the company looks ahead to further expansion and development in the field of video surveillance.

news.headline: SEI Investments Company raises stock repurchase program by $400 million to approximately $429 million.
news.summary: In Oaks, Pennsylvania, on October 22, 2024, the Board of Directors of SEI Investments Company authorized a boost in its stock repurchase initiative by $400 million. This brings the total available funds under the program to around $429 million, with $29 million already utilized.

news.headline: SEC sues Andrew Left associate Choi for trading on tweets.
Intrepid Potash (NYSE: IPI) to release Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 4, 2024, with conference call scheduled for Nov 5 at 12:00pm EST.
news.summary: Intrepid Potash, Inc. (NYSE: IPI) is set to unveil its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on November 4, after the market closes. Following this, a conference call is scheduled for November 5, 2024, at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time. During the call, company executives will delve into the results, operational updates, financial aspects, and address queries from investors. To participate, individuals can join the call through the toll-free dial-in number 1 (800) 715-9871 or the International dial-in number.

news.headline: Crescent Energy (NYSE: CRGY) to discuss Q3 2024 results on Nov 5, 2024, after market close with webcast and call at 10 a.m. CT. Website: www.crescentenergyco.com.
news.summary: Crescent Energy Company (NYSE: CRGY) has revealed their agenda to conduct a conference call and webcast at 10 a.m. CT on Tuesday, November 5, 2024. This session aims to delve into the financial and operating outcomes of the third quarter of the same year. The company intends to unveil the results post the market closure on Monday, November 4, 2024. Interested individuals can access the release and additional slides on Crescent Energy Company's website: www.crescentenergyco.com. The conference call is set for 10 a.m. CT (11 a.m. ET) on Tuesday.

news.headline: Avery Dennison boosts RFID use in grocery retail sector in Mentor, Ohio.
news.summary: Avery Dennison is making strides in the grocery retail sector by increasing the use of RFID technology. The company's initiative aims to enhance efficiency and accuracy in inventory management. The expansion of RFID adoption in this industry is crucial, with reports showing a significant increase in productivity and cost savings of up to 20% for businesses that implement this technology. This step is anticipated to have a positive impact on the overall profitability of grocery retailers.

news.headline: Pagaya Tech (NASDAQ: PGY) to reveal Q3 2024 earnings on Nov 12. Conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET on Nov 12. Visit investor.pagaya.com for details.
news.summary: Pagaya Technologies, listed on the NASDAQ as PGY, is set to unveil its Q3 2024 financial results on November 12, 2024. The company will host a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET / 3:30 p.m. IST on the same day to discuss the earnings. To participate in the live webcast presentation, interested individuals can register through Pagaya’s Investor Relations website at investor.pagaya.com. A replay of the webcast will also be accessible on the IR website post-event. Pagaya Technologies is a prominent player in the financial technology industry.

news.headline: FS Bancorp, Inc. reported Q3 net income of $10.3 million ($1.29 per diluted share), a increase from last year.
news.summary: In Mountlake Terrace, Washington, on October 22, 2024, FS Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: FSBW), the parent company of 1st Security Bank of Washington, announced a third-quarter net income of $10.3 million, translating to $1.29 per diluted share. This marks an increase from the same period last year when the net income was $9.0 million, or $1.13 per diluted share. For the nine months ending on September 30, 2024, the net income stood at $27.6 million, equivalent to $3.45 per diluted share, showing growth from the previous year’s figure of $26.3 million, or $3.33 per diluted share, for the same period in 2023.

news.headline: Treace Medical Concepts to report Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 5, 2024. Conference call at 4:30 pm ET.
news.summary: In Ponte Vedra, Florida, on October 22, 2024, Treace Medical Concepts, Inc. (NasdaqGS: TMCI), a medical technology company known for its Lapiplasty® and Adductoplasty® Procedures for bunions and midfoot deformities, will report its financial performance for Q3 of 2024 after markets close on November 5, 2024. A conference call led by company management to review the results will commence at 4:30 pm ET.

news.headline: Sotera Health (Nasdaq: SHC) to release Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 5, 2024, with a conference call at 9:00 am ET.
news.summary: In Cleveland on October 22, 2024, Sotera Health Company (Nasdaq: SHC) revealed intentions to disclose its financial outcomes for the third quarter concluding on September 30, 2024, prior to the market opening on Tuesday, November 5, 2024. The conference call, scheduled for 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time post-release, will feature management discussing the company’s operational achievements and financial figures. Sotera Health Company is a prominent worldwide provider of essential sterilization services, comprehensive lab testing, and advisory solutions for the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Amalgamated Financial Corp. declares dividend of $0.12 per share on Nov 21, 2024, for stockholders of record on Nov 5, 2024.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Amalgamated Financial Corp. disclosed a regular dividend of $0.12 per share for common stockholders. The dividend is set to be paid on November 21, 2024, to shareholders on record as of November 5, 2024. The Board of Directors retains the discretion over both the amount and schedule of upcoming dividend distributions. Amalgamated Financial Corp. trades on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol AMAL.

news.headline: US commerce dept. imposes duties on imports of disposable aluminum containers from China on Oct. 22, 2024. #Tariffs #Trade #Aluminum
news.summary: The U.S. Department of Commerce stated that imports of disposable aluminum containers, pans, trays, and lids from China are being unfairly subsidized by the government there, as per their preliminary assessment on Oct. 22, 2024. The investigation revealed that these imports have been benefiting from these subsidies. This decision could impact the market significantly as it addresses the preliminary findings of unfair trade practices.

news.headline: New: Coherent launches adaptable 2D cutter head for lasers with max power of 12 kW.
GCC announces third quarter 2024 results; leading supplier of cement and concrete in US and Mexico.
news.summary: In Chihuahua, Mexico, on October 22, 2024, GCC, S.A.B. de C.V. (BMV: GCC*), a prominent cement and concrete supplier in the US and Mexico, reported its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024.
